---
title: "draft1 cleaning missing data"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Quarto

```{r} 
#| label: load-data 
#| warning: false

library(tidyverse)

# file pathway

cleveland_path <- '/Users/arielalivne/clinical projects/missing data/heart+disease/processed.cleveland.data'

# define columns names

col_names <- c("age", "sex", "cp", "trestbps", "chol", "fbs", "restecg", "thalach", "exang", "oldpeak", "slope", "ca", "thal", "num")

# readinf data

df <- read.csv(cleveland_path, header = FALSE, col.names = col_names)

# turning ? into missing (NA)

df[df == "?"] <- NA

# המרת כל העמודות למספרים

df <- df %>% mutate(across(everything(), as.numeric))

# הצגת בדיקת החוסרים

colSums(is.na(df))

```
''' {r}
#| lable: handle-missing-values

#option1: removing rows with missing data
df_clean <- df %>% drop_na()

'''{r}
library (pwr)
'''
